name: Tomato Quiche
recipeIngredient: 3 good size tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Bake pie crust in a large pie pan or quiche pan for 10 minutes at 400 degrees.
3. In a saucepan, combine chopped tomatoes, onion, butter, salt, and thyme or basil. Cook over medium heat until the mixture is reduced by half.
4. Place cheese on the baked crust.
5. Pour the tomato mixture over the cheese.
6. Mix eggs and cream in a separate bowl.
7. Pour the egg and cream mixture over the tomato mixture.
8. Bake for 10 minutes at 425 degrees, then reduce temperature to 375 degrees and bake for an additional 35 minutes or until set.
9. Allow quiche to rest for a few minutes before cutting.
Serves 6 to 8.
